name: Dried Pear Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the fruit and slice it very thin using an electric meat slicer.
2. Dip the slices in simple syrup.
3. Lay the coated slices on a parchment-lined sheet pan.
4. Place the tray in a 200-degree convection oven for 40-60 minutes, until dried out.
5. Once done, carefully peel the slices off the paper while they are still hot.
6. Allow them to cool completely on a wire rack.
7. Store in an airtight container.
Yield: 8 servings
